summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of LOGITAG Premium Reports page (PremiumReports.jsx). All 13 test cases passed: 3-panel builder layout, 2 report types (Asset/Site) with working switch, item selection via checkbox/row click, 'Tout sélectionner' functionality, search filtering, configuration panel (title, dates, presets, auto-send), disabled/enabled build button states, report result view with summary (entrées, sorties, durée, moyenne/jour), grouped data tables with correct columns, and all action buttons (Retour, Imprimer, PDF, Envoyer).

minor.impact: Real-time features affected but core functionality works

passed_tests: 1. Page Rapports loads with 3-panel builder layout (data-testid='report-builder')
2. Panel 1: 2 report types present - 'Rapport par Asset' and 'Rapport par Site'
3. Report type switch works - clicking 'Rapport par Site' updates Panel 2 to show Sites list (36 sites)
4. Report type switch works - clicking 'Rapport par Asset' updates Panel 2 to show Assets list (200 assets)
5. Panel 2: Item selection via row click works (checkbox toggles)
6. Panel 2: 'Tout sélectionner' selects all items (200/200 for assets, 36/36 for sites)
7. Panel 2: Search filtering works - searching 'Tag' filters to 7 items
8. Panel 3: Configuration panel with title input, date range, presets, auto-send toggle
9. Panel 3: Date presets work (Aujourd'hui, 7 jours, 30 jours, Ce mois)
10. Panel 3: Auto-send toggle reveals email input and frequency options (Quotidien, Hebdomadaire, Mensuel)
11. Build button disabled when 0 items selected, enabled when items selected
12. Report result view displays summary: Entrées, Sorties, Durée totale, Moy./jour
13. Report result view: Data grouped by asset/site with columns: Date, Entrée, Sortie, Zone/Site, Durée
14. Report result view: 'Retour au constructeur' button returns to builder view
15. Report result view: Imprimer, PDF, Envoyer buttons present and clickable
critical_code_review_comments: PremiumReports.jsx: Well-structured 3-panel layout with proper data-testid attributes
Report type switching correctly resets selections and updates title
Search filtering uses useMemo for performance optimization
Report data is MOCKED (client-side generated) - not from real API due to slow external API
All interactive elements have proper data-testid for testing
CSS styles are embedded in component (STYLES constant) - could be extracted to separate file for maintainability
seed_data_creation: None - using external API data via proxy for assets/sites, report data is client-side generated (MOCKED)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reports page fully tested and working. Route: /rapport/index. Features: 3-panel builder (Type, Items, Config), 2 report types (Asset/Site), item selection with search and select-all, date presets, auto-send config, report generation with summary and grouped data tables. Report data is MOCKED (client-side generated). External API is slow (10-20 sec) - always wait 8-10 seconds after navigation.

mocked_apis_list: Report data generation is client-side (mock data for entries/exits)
